description: Regression gates for `python -m evals.runner --check`. Floors are set to the measured 2026-06-11 baseline ('do not regress'), NOT to the aspirational target. Two known gaps are tracked in evals/FINDINGS.md: (1) no_false_archive_grounding target is 100% but currently 87.5% because RELEVANCE_THRESHOLD is defined but unused in hybrid_retrieval; (2) mean_faithfulness is a conservative lower bound because the judge only sees 300-char citation spans, not full chunk text. Tighten these once fixed.
